diagrams.title: Object Pointer Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how object pointer stores address of object in memory
elements: Arrow from pointer points to object

diagrams.title: this Pointer Concept
diagrams.description: Illustrates how this pointer always points to current object invoking the function
elements: Member function called on Object A
Inside function, this->member accesses Object A's members

diagrams.title: Base and Derived Pointer Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows base class pointer pointing to derived class objects for polymorphism
elements: Three derived class objects at different addresses
Pointer can hold address of any derived object
Virtual function call resolves at runtime

diagrams.title: new and delete Memory Flow
diagrams.description: Demonstrates heap allocation with new and deallocation with delete
diagrams.purpose: Understand dynamic memory lifecycle for objects
